title: Brightness Mod
description: A simple a Night vision mod that allows you to see everything around you. and gives you a night vision effect in client side. this Minecraft mod for 1.21.11 only!
body:
A simple a Night vision mod that allows you to see everything around you. and gives you a night vision effect in client side. this Minecraft mod for 1.21.11 only.

First: You need to install Fabric API (1.21.11)
and install my mod

the keybind is K to enable it or disable it

The Mod doesn't support Mod Menu. (I will support it soon!)
